site.project_name: Cubbard Road Marlboro Parametric Site Study
site.location: Cubbard Drive / Old Indian Road / Route 9W, Marlborough, NY
site.coordinate_system: WGS84 source points; app uses local ENU feet for schematic geometry

model_b_default.notes: Parametric seed follows v0.7 Model B geometry/fit-check values.

stormwater_screening.pond_engineering_rule: Any proposed pond, detention basin, retention basin, infiltration basin, or impoundment must be engineered and reviewed.
